learning.evaluation_split_origin: SciFact evidence retrieval split sampled into NanoMedical
learning.leakage_note: exclude SciFact evaluation claims, positive abstracts, and near-duplicate claims derived from the same source citances
useful_training_data: SciFact-style rationale and verification data outside the evaluation split

synthetic_data.document_generation: biomedical abstracts with explicit methods, findings, and outcomes
synthetic_data.question_generation: atomic scientific claims about one result, association, intervention, or mechanism
synthetic_data.answerability: the abstract should contain evidence sufficient to support or refute the claim
synthetic_data.hard_negatives: same-topic abstracts differing in direction, condition, population, or outcome

learning.multi_positive_training: mostly single-positive with limited multi-positive support

references.title: Fact or Fiction: Verifying Scientific Claims
